title: attributes — trait composition
description: Three owned traits. `HasAttributeSet` is the host-side trait — mixes into any Eloquent model marked `#[AttributableEntity]` and exposes the resolved-set helpers. `HasSchemalessAttributes` wraps `spatie/laravel-schemaless-attributes` to inject validation on save. `BelongsToAttributeSet` is a satellite trait for hosts that snapshot the set version.

owned.description: Host-side trait. Adds `->attributeSet(): AttributeSet` (resolves the active set for `(entityType, discriminator_value_from_column)`), `->attributeValues(): array` (reads the JSONB values column), `->validateAttributeValues(): array<string>` (returns validation errors), `->renderAttributeField(string $code): array` (renders one field for the UI). Boot hook registers the model with `AttributableEntityRegistry`.
owned.note: The host is expected to have a JSONB column (default `attributes`) + a snapshot column (`attribute_set_version_snapshot INT` OR `attribute_set_snapshot_id ULID`). The trait does NOT add these — the host migration owns them.

owned.description: Thin wrapper around `spatie/laravel-schemaless-attributes` that injects the AttributeValidator on `saving` — refuses save when validation fails. Composed alongside `HasAttributeSet`.
For satellite tables that reference an AttributeSet directly (e.g. progress card snapshots). Adds `->attributeSet(): BelongsTo` + boot hook validating cross-tenant references.

external.usage: Powers JSONB-column values on host entities. This module wraps its save hook with AttributeValidator.

attribute_definition.notes: SoftDeletes so historic references from AttributeSet.definition_order stay resolvable.

attribute_set.notes: SoftDeletes preserves superseded versions for historic render.
